prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall, medium shot of Mira Ledgerfall, an androgynous cadre with silver hair and a navy cloak, and Ari Silverbrook, a feminine guild coordinator. Mira slides a heavy, leather-bound ledger across a polished wooden desk toward Ari, pointing at a specific entry with a confident, professional gesture. The background shows a bustling, warm-lit guild hall with magical ambient glows. No text, no watermarks.

Same continuous shot, Ari Silverbrook nods in agreement, picks up a brass quest stamp, and presses it firmly onto the page Mira is indicating in the ledger. They share a brief, cooperative, and professional glance, completing the administrative task together. Consistent lighting, character appearance, and camera angle. No text, no watermarks.
